title: We make your American dreams a reality. — ELLIS PORTER
content:
Temporary Visas for Individuals | Marriage Based Visas & Green Cards | Family Based Green Cards | Naturalization & Citizenship | Waivers, Asylum & Humanitarian Relief | Immigration Court Representation

## Temporary Visas for Individuals
Whether you are coming to the U.S. to study, to visit friends and family, to see the sights or to experience a slice of life in America, there is a visa category for you.  Ellis Porter provides advice and services related to the following temporary visa categories for individuals:
- B-2 Visas for Visitors & Tourists
B-2 Visas for Visitors & Tourists
- F-1 Visas for Students
F-1 Visas for Students
- J-1 Visas for Exchange Visitors
J-1 Visas for Exchange Visitors

## Marriage Based Visas & Green Cards
In a smaller world, true love can extend beyond borders.  Connect with us and we'll make sure that borders aren't barriers for your international love story.
Ellis Porter provides the following services for the foreign national spouses of U.S. Citizens:

### Marriage Based Visas
- K-1 Visas for Fiance/Fiancee of U.S. Citizens
K-1 Visas for Fiance/Fiancee of U.S. Citizens
- K-3 Visas for Spouse of U.S. Citizens
K-3 Visas for Spouse of U.S. Citizens

### Marriage Based Green Cards
- Green Cards for Spouse of U.S. Citizens
Green Cards for Spouse of U.S. Citizens

## Family Based Green Cards
In a smaller world, family trees have global roots.  There a many paths that can help bring your family closer to you.  Let us help you find the right path to America for your family.
Ellis Porter provides the following green card services for U.S. Citizens and U.S. Permanent Residents and their foreign national relatives:
- Green Cards for Immediate Relatives of U.S. Citizens
Green Cards for Immediate Relatives of U.S. Citizens
- Green Cards for Other Relatives of U.S. Citizens
Green Cards for Other Relatives of U.S. Citizens
- Green Cards for Relatives of U.S. Permanent Residents
Green Cards for Relatives of U.S. Permanent Residents

## Naturalization & Citizenship
In a smaller world, America continues to welcome new citizens from every nation.  We think that is what makes America great.
Ellis Porter provides legal services for individuals seeking U.S. Citizenship:
- U.S. Citizenship by Naturalization
U.S. Citizenship by Naturalization

## Waivers, Asylum & Humanitarian Relief
In a smaller world, the United States remains a beacon of hope for all those who simply seek the opportunity to pursue life, liberty and happiness.  For those who are seeking refuge in America, and those who encounter challenges along the way, we are here to help.
Ellis Porter provides the following services for individuals requiring waivers and individuals seeking asylum and other humanitarian relief:
- Nonimmigrant Waivers of Inadmissibility
Nonimmigrant Waivers of Inadmissibility
- Immigrant Waivers of Inadmissibility
Immigrant Waivers of Inadmissibility

### Asylum & Humanitarian Relief
- Temporary Protected Status (TPS)
Temporary Protected Status (TPS)
- Violence Against Women Act (VAWA)
Violence Against Women Act (VAWA)
- Special Immigrant Juvenile Status (SIJS)
Special Immigrant Juvenile Status (SIJS)
- S Visas for Witnesses and Informants Assisting Law Enforcement
S Visas for Witnesses and Informants Assisting Law Enforcement
- T Visas for Victims of Human Trafficking
T Visas for Victims of Human Trafficking
- U Visas for Victims of Criminal Activity
U Visas for Victims of Criminal Activity
